comments.SERVER_HOST: IC Mesh server hostname - usually moilol.com
comments.SERVER_PORT: WebSocket port for mesh connection - usually 8333
comments.NODE_ID: Unique identifier for your node - make it descriptive
comments.capabilities: List of services your node can provide - see ONBOARDING-GUIDE.md
comments.maxJobs: Maximum concurrent jobs (start with 1-3, increase based on performance)
comments.description: Human-readable description shown in operator dashboard

setup_instructions: 1. Copy to node-config.json, 2. Customize NODE_ID and owner, 3. Install tools for your capabilities, 4. Run diagnostic: node onboarding-diagnostic.js
